cases.title: REST CRUD endpoint with correct status codes
cases.prompt: Design a REST API for a `tasks` resource with list, create, update, and delete endpoints. Use correct HTTP methods, status codes, and consistent JSON response shape.

cases.title: Paginated list endpoint with cursor or offset
cases.prompt: Design a paginated GET /tasks endpoint. Include either cursor-based or offset pagination, with consistent metadata (total, nextCursor or page info) in the response.

cases.title: Consistent error response shape
cases.prompt: Define the error response shape for an API. Every error must have a code, message, and optional field-level errors. Show examples for validation errors, not-found, and unauthorized.

cases.title: Idempotent webhook handler
cases.prompt: Implement a webhook handler that processes Stripe payment events. It must be idempotent (safe to receive duplicate events), verify the signature, and acknowledge receipt with 200 before processing.

cases.title: API versioning strategy
cases.prompt: Design a versioning strategy for a public REST API. Explain when to use URL versioning vs header versioning, and show how to deprecate v1 while supporting v2.
